query: 2026 NBA Finals average margin of victory four points every game within five points final five minutes series stats
a_issues: Content A lacks the key facts needed to answer the query. Its NBA.com stats result is truncated and does not show the team series stats or the clutch/final-five-minutes fact. reasoning: The question asks about the 2026 NBA Finals being decided by an average margin of four points, every game being within five points in the final five minutes, and likely wants supporting series stats. Content B directly contains the crucial facts: Wikipedia says the average margin of victory was four points, and NBA.com says the 2026 Finals was the only Finals in 30 years of play-by-play data where every game was within five points in the last five minutes. NBC News in B also adds that through four games the teams were separated by only 8 total points, matching the close-series framing in the anchor. By contrast, Content A only indirectly suggests the four-point average via a Reddit post about the first four games and does not provide the decisive NBA.com clutch-stat fact in the snippets. Therefore B better enables an LLM to answer correctly.
